backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a school management system with student, teacher, fee, attendance, and report card management, including role-based access control (admin/user/guest), blob storage integration, and authentication via Internet Identity and teacher credentials.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented PWA functionality including service worker registration, manifest configuration, app icons, install prompt component, and splash screen setup with associated test IDs and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of frontend components describing authentication flows, role-based access, offline support with React Query, PWA features, premium UI styling with gradients and glass effects, and management interfaces for students, teachers, fees, and attendance.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color system for light and dark modes, defining CSS variables for UI components (background, foreground, primary, secondary, destructive, borders, charts, sidebar) with precise lightness and chroma values.
frontend/index.html: Main HTML entry point with PWA meta tags (theme-color, apple-mobile-web-app settings), manifest link, favicon and icon references, and viewport configuration for School Mitra application.
frontend/public/manifest.json: PWA manifest defining School Mitra app metadata including name, description, standalone display mode, theme colors, icon configurations (192x192, 512x512 with maskable purpose), and categories for app stores.
frontend/public/offline.html: Standalone offline fallback page with gradient background, centered card layout, WiFi-off icon, and retry button that displays when the user is offline and service worker cannot serve cached content.
frontend/public/service-worker.js: Service worker implementing caching strategies for offline support: cache-first for static assets, network-first with cache fallback for API calls, and special handling to skip caching Internet Identity authentication URLs.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main application component managing authentication flow, actor initialization, and user profile setup with loading states and error handling for each stage.
frontend/src/components/AttendanceSectio: Admin-only attendance management component with tabs for marking daily attendance and viewing monthly summaries, including bulk attendance submission and student filtering.
frontend/src/components/DashboardOvervie: Dashboard overview displaying key metrics (students, teachers, fees) in card format with loading skeletons, error handling, and retry functionality.
frontend/src/components/FeesSection.tsx: Fee management interface with CRUD operations for fee records, search/filter capabilities, and summary statistics showing total, paid, and unpaid fees.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Simple footer component displaying app branding, attribution link to caffeine.ai, and copyright information.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Application header with branding, user profile display, and logout functionality that clears authentication and query cache.
frontend/src/components/LoginScreen.tsx: Login screen component with tabs for admin (Internet Identity) and teacher (credentials-based) authentication, including form validation and error handling.
frontend/src/components/OfflineIndicator: Displays a fixed alert banner at the top of the screen when the user goes offline, listening to browser online/offline events.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog for first-time admin profile setup that cannot be dismissed, collecting the user's name and setting role to 'admin'.
frontend/src/components/PWAInstallPrompt: Shows a dismissible card prompt in the bottom-right corner to install the app as a PWA with install and dismiss actions.
frontend/src/components/ReportCardsSecti: Manages student report cards with add/edit dialogs, subject marks entry, filtering by student/class, and displays report cards in a table with grades and teacher remarks.
Student management interface with search/filter by class, add/edit/delete operations, displaying students in a table with avatar support and hero banner.
Teacher management section restricted to admins, featuring search, add/edit/delete operations, credential management with password visibility toggle, and hero banner.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for managing user login/logout state, identity persistence, and AuthClient configuration with support for delegation identity validation.
frontend/src/hooks/usePWAInstall.ts: Custom hook that manages Progressive Web App installation prompts, handling the beforeinstallprompt event, user dismissals with 7-day cooldown, and installation state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including user profiles, teacher authentication, dashboard metrics, students, teachers, fees, attendance, and report cards with error handling and cache management.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind configuration, custom CSS variables for light/dark themes using OKLCH color space, premium gradient utilities, and glass-effect styling for UI components.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions including cn() for merging Tailwind classes and formatINR() for formatting numbers as Indian Rupees with proper lakhs/crores grouping.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClientProvider for data fetching and InternetIdentityProvider for authentication context.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page component with tabbed navigation for overview, students, teachers, fees, attendance, and report cards sections, with role-based access control for admin and teacher views.
frontend/src/registerServiceWorker.ts: Registers the service worker for PWA functionality, handles update detection, and logs registration status with fallback for unsupported browsers.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support and functions to clear sensitive parameters from URLs.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color system, custom fonts (Dancing Script, Inter), premium shadows with glow effects, and custom animations (float, glow, shimmer).
project_state.json: Project state document defining a school management PWA with multi-role authentication (Admin/Teacher), role-based access control, offline capabilities, and tracking existing features like login flows, teacher management, attendance, and fee management.
